zh.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson是Gregers Birgersson和Kristiina Tunnasdotter的兒子，出生。他於1282年9月27日之後與Ragnhild Erlandsdotter在瑞典結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1326年1月9日，埋葬在瑞典斯托可霍爾姆希圖納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson是Gregers Birgersson和Kristiina Tunnasdotter的儿子，出生。他于1282年9月27日之后与Ragnhild Erlandsdotter在瑞典结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1326年1月9日，埋葬在瑞典斯托可霍爾姆希圖納。

nameMeanings.name: Gregersson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Juel, Lars, Viggo.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Gregersen  .

variants.name: Gregersen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Nils, Aksel, Bjorn, Dagny, Juel.  German Hans, Detlef, Erna, Hermann, Jurgen.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Greger(s) (see Gregory ).

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

historicEvents.title: The Hatuna Games
historicEvents.description: A conflict on September 29, 1306, between Birger, King of Sweden, and his brothers, the dukes Eric Magnusson and Valdemar Magnusson is known as The Hatuna Games. The brothers arrived to a party late in the night at King Birger's estate. The dukes captured and imprisoned Birger and his wife in Nykoping Castle's dungeon. Duke Eric then gained power over Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson was born as the son of Gregers Birgersson and Kristiina Tunnasdotter. He married Ragnhild Erlandsdotter after 27 September 1282, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 9 January 1326, and was buried in Sigtuna, Stockholm, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson est né, fils de Gregers Birgersson et Kristiina Tunnasdotter. Il a épousé Ragnhild Erlandsdotter après 27 septembre 1282, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1326, et a été enterré à Sigtuna, Stockholm, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson wurde, als Sohn von Gregers Birgersson und Kristiina Tunnasdotter geboren. Er hat nach 27. September 1282 in Schweden Ragnhild Erlandsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. Januar 1326 und wurde in Sigtuna, Stockholm, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson è nato il come figlio di Gregers Birgersson e Kristiina Tunnasdotter. Lui sposato Ragnhild Erlandsdotter dopo il 27 settembre 1282, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 gennaio 1326, e fu sepolto a Sigtuna, Stockholm, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus GregerssonはGregers BirgerssonとKristiina Tunnasdotterの息子として生まれた。1282年9月27日以後にスウェーデンでRagnhild Erlandsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1326年1月9日に死去し，スウェーデンストックhオルムシグトゥナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson(은)는 Gregers Birgersson(와)과 Kristiina Tunnasdotter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1282년 9월 27일 이후 스웨덴에서 Ragnhild Erlandsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1326년 1월 9일 사망했으며 스웨덴 스톡홀름 시그툰아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson nasceu filho de Gregers Birgersson e Kristiina Tunnasdotter. Ele casou-se com Ragnhild Erlandsdotter após 27 de setembro de 1282, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1326, e foi sepultado em Sigtuna, Stockholm, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson родился. Его родителей звали Gregers Birgersson и Kristiina Tunnasdotter. Он женился на женщине по имени Ragnhild Erlandsdotter после 27 сентябрь 1282 г. в местности Швеция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 9 января 1326 г. и был похоронен в местности сигтуна, стоккхолм, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Magnus Gregersson nació como hijo de Gregers Birgersson y Kristiina Tunnasdotter. Se casó con Ragnhild Erlandsdotter después de 27 de septiembre de 1282, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de enero de 1326, y fue sepultado en Sigtuna, Stockholm, Suecia.
